creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a known and essentially unfixable bug - sysinstall currently 
does not know when a package will be interactive (there's no external 
clues for this provided by said package) and when it is, it throws 
sysinstall for a loop.  The package in question should probably just 
not attempt to be interactive in the case where isatty(0) = FALSE.
